corrective_error_message: 'n_compositional_parts' is only used when primary_task='composition'. Set n_compositional_parts=None for the selected task.
'n_comparison_levels' is only used when comparison_structure='paired_repeated'. Set n_comparison_levels=1 for the selected comparison structure.
'n_overlaid_series' is only used when primary_task='temporal_pattern'. Set n_overlaid_series=1 for the selected task.
'many_observations' currently changes recommendations only for primary_task='temporal_pattern' or primary_task='relationship'. Set many_observations=False for the selected task.
comparison_focus='conditions' means a comparison is being made. Set comparison_structure='independent' or comparison_structure='paired_repeated'.
comparison_structure='paired_repeated' requires at least two linked comparison levels. Set n_comparison_levels to 2 or greater.
comparison_focus='groups' means a comparison is being made. Set comparison_structure='independent' or comparison_structure='paired_repeated'.
comparison_focus='none' is valid and means there is no comparison. For this choice, also set comparison_structure='not_applicable'.
Incompatible inputs: primary_task='compare_values' requires a comparison. Set comparison_focus to 'groups', 'time', or 'conditions'. If there is no comparison, choose a different primary_task.

Incompatible comparison inputs: comparison_structure='paired_repeated' requires a comparison. Set comparison_focus to 'groups', 'time', or 'conditions'. If there is no comparison, keep comparison_focus='none' and set comparison_structure='not_applicable'.
comparison_focus='time' means a comparison is being made. Set comparison_structure='independent' or comparison_structure='paired_repeated'.
Missing input: primary_task='composition' requires 'n_compositional_parts'. Enter the number of movement-behaviour parts that together form the fixed whole, for example 4.
Incompatible inputs: primary_task='distribution' necessarily displays variability. Set show_variability=True.
Incompatible inputs: primary_task='relationship' requires data_form='continuous_signal' or data_form='derived_metric'. For categories, use primary_task='compare_values'.
Incompatible inputs: primary_task='composition' requires data_form='classified_behaviour' or data_form='composition'. Change 'data_form', or choose a different 'primary_task'.
Incompatible inputs: primary_task='relationship' requires paired observed values. Set display_level='individual' or display_level='multiple_observations', not 'summary'.
